name: private-zones
title: Azure DNS — Private DNS Zones
summary: Creates private DNS zones with virtual network links (optional VM auto-registration) and A/CNAME/TXT record sets.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: resource_group_name
module.description: Name of the existing resource group for the private DNS zones.

module.name: private_zones
module.type: map(object({ domain_name = string vnet_links = optional(map(object({ vnet_id = string registration_enabled = optional(bool, false) })), {}) a_records = optional(map(object({ name = string ttl = optional(number, 300) records = list(string) })), {}) cname_records = optional(map(object({ name = string ttl = optional(number, 300) record = string })), {}) txt_records = optional(map(object({ name = string ttl = optional(number, 300) records = list(string) })), {}) }))
module.description: Map of private DNS zones keyed by logical name. Unlike AWS, an Azure private zone can exist with zero VNet links; resolution only works from linked VNets. registration_enabled auto-creates records for VMs in the linked VNet (max one registration link per VNet).

outputs.name: zone_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical zone name to private DNS zone ID.

outputs.name: zone_names
outputs.description: Map of logical zone name to DNS domain name.

outputs.name: vnet_link_ids
outputs.description: Map of '<zone-key>/<link-key>' to virtual network link ID.

outputs.name: record_ids
outputs.description: Map of '<type>/<zone-key>/<record-key>' to record ID across A, CNAME, and TXT records.
